caption: The video features a presentation titled "Industrial Machine Learning: Horizontally Scalable Data Pipelines with Airflow" by Alejandro Saucedo, as part of the EuroPython conference held in Edinburgh from July 23-29, 2018. The presenter, dressed in a suit and standing behind a podium, appears to be delivering an informative talk on leveraging Apache Airflow for building scalable data pipelines in industrial machine learning contexts. The slide displayed includes a network diagram, symbolizing interconnected data processes or workflows, which likely serves as a visual aid to explain the concepts being discussed. The setting suggests a professional and educational environment aimed at data scientists, engineers, and enthusiasts interested in advanced data processing techniques.
